Since these issues can be considered fundamental for all the following discussions, from
the intuitive considerations reported above, we can now move to a precise small-signal Laplace-
domain analysis, that might be very useful for a clear understanding of control limitations and
delay effects implied by the uniformly sampled PWM.
An equivalent model of the uniformly sampled PWM process is represented in Fig. 2.6(a).
As can be seen, the schematic diagram adopts the typical continuous time model of a sampled
data system, where an ideal sampler is followed by a zero-order-hold (ZOH). e quantization
effect that is associated, in the physical implementation of the modulator of Fig. 2.5, to the dig-
ital counter and binary comparator operation, is neglected, being irrelevant from the dynamic
response delay standpoint. Accordingly, in the model of Fig. 2.6(a), after the modulating signal
m.t/ is processed by the ZOH, the PWM waveform is generated by an ideal analog comparator,
that compares the ZOH output signal ms .t/ and the carrier waveform c.t /.
Depending on c.t/, several different uniformly-sampled pulse-width modulators can be
obtained. For example, in Fig. 2.6(b) a trailing-edge modulation is depicted, where the update of
the modulating signal is performed at the beginning of the modulation period. Note that this is
an exactly equivalent representation of the modulator organization of Fig. 2.5.  翻译

既然这些问题可以被视为所有后续讨论的基本问题，从上述直观考虑出发，我们现在可以进行精确的小信号拉普拉斯域分析，这可能对清楚理解由均匀采样的 PWM 所隐含的控制限制和时延效应非常有用。

均匀采样 PWM 过程的等效模型如图 2.6(a) 所示。可以看到，原理图采用了典型的采样数据系统的连续时间模型，其中一个理想采样器后跟一个零阶保持器 (ZOH)。在物理实现上，与图 2.5 的调制器相关的量化效应与动态响应延迟是无关的，因此被忽略。因此，在图 2.6(a) 的模型中，在调制信号 m.t/ 经过 ZOH 处理后， PWM 波形是由理想模拟比较器生成的，该比较器比较 ZOH 输出信号 ms .t/ 和载波波形 c.t/。

根据 c.t/，可以得到几种不同的均匀采样脉宽调制器。例如，图 2.6(b) 描绘了一个尾随边缘调制，其中在调制周期的开始时更新调制信号。请注意，这是图 2.5 调制器组织的完全等效表示。

where VMO.s/ and M.s/ represent the Laplace transforms of VMO.t / and m.t /, respectively. ere-
fore, the uniformly sampled modulator presents a delay whose value is proportional to the steady-
state duty-cycle D. In more general terms, the delay introduced by the PWM modulator can be
defined as the time distance between the modulating signal m.t / sampling instant and the instant
when the output pulse is completely determined (i.e., when ms .t / intersects c.t / in Fig. 2.6).
Based on this definition, the result (2.5) has been extended also to other types of modulator orga-
nizations (trailing edge, triangular carrier, etc.) [8]. For example, for the leading-edge modulation
represented in Fig. 2.6(c), the small-signal modulator transfer function turns out to be:

其中 VMO.s/ 和 M.s/ 分别表示 VMO.t / 和 m.t / 的拉普拉斯变换。因此，均匀采样调制器呈现出与稳态占空比 D 成比例的延迟。更一般地，由 PWM 调制器引入的延迟可以定义为调制信号 m.t / 采样瞬间与完全确定输出脉冲的时刻之间的时间距离（即，图 2.6 中 ms .t / 与 c.t / 相交的时刻）。基于这个定义，结果（2.5）已扩展到其他类型的调制器组织（尾随边缘、三角形载波等）[8]。例如，对于图 2.6(c) 所示的前沿调制，小信号调制器传递函数为：

To partially compensate for the increased delay of the uniformly sampled PWM, the double up-
date mode of operation is often available in several microcontrollers and DSPs. In this mode, the
duty-cycle update is allowed at the beginning and at the half of the modulation period. Conse-
quently, in each modulation period, the match condition between counter and duty-cycle registers
is checked twice, at first during the run-up phase, then during the run-down phase.
In the occurrence of a match, the state of the gate signal is toggled. As can be seen in
Fig. 2.7, the result of this mode of operation is a stream of gate pulses that are symmetrically
allocated within the modulation period, at least in the absence of any perturbation. Interrupt
requests are generated by the timer at the beginning and at the half of the modulation period, to
allow proper synchronization with other control functions, e.g., with the sampling process.
It is also evident from Fig. 2.7 that, in the occurrence of a perturbation, the modulator
response delay is reduced, with respect to the single update case because, now, the duty-cycle
update can be performed at the occurrence of each half period interrupt request. In this case,

为了部分补偿均匀采样 PWM 的增加的延迟，许多微控制器和 DSPs 通常提供双重更新模式。在这种模式下，占空比更新允许在调制周期的开头和中点。因此，在每个调制周期中，匹配条件在上升阶段和下降阶段都被检查了两次。

如果发生匹配，门信号的状态会切换。如图 2.7 所示，这种操作模式的结果是一系列在调制周期内对称分配的门脉冲，至少在没有任何扰动的情况下是如此。定时器在调制周期的开头和中点产生中断请求，以允许与其他控制功能（例如采样过程）进行正确同步。

从图 2.7 也可以明显看出，在发生干扰的情况下，与单次更新相比，调制器响应延迟得到减小，因为现在占空比更新可以在每个半周期中断请求发生时进行。在这种情况下，可以至少减少一半的延迟。

however, an asymmetric pulse is generated, but symmetry is restored immediately afterwards, so
that its temporary loss is of little consequence.
Maybe less evident is the drawback of this operating mode: given the number of bits, Ne ,
needed to represent the duty-cycle and the clock frequency fclock, the switching period has to be
doubled to contain both the run up and run down phases. Of course, it is possible to maintain the
same modulation frequency of the single update case, but, in order to do that, either the clock
frequency needs to be doubled or the number of bits needs to be reduced by one.
Following the reasoning reported in the previous section, we can derive an exact, continuous
time equivalent model also of the digital PWM with double duty-cycle update. A representation
of this model is shown in Fig. 2.8. Simple calculations show that the small-signal modulator
transfer function is, in this case, given by [8]:

然而，这种操作模式的缺点可能不太明显：给定需要表示占空比的比特数 Ne 和时钟频率 fclock，切换周期必须加倍以包含运行上升和下降阶段。当然，可以保持单次更新情况下相同的调制频率，但是为了做到这一点，时钟频率需要加倍，或者需要将比特数减少一个。

根据前面的推理，我们也可以得到数字 PWM 的精确连续时间等效模型，它具有双重占空比更新。该模型的表示如图 2.8 所示。简单的计算表明，小信号调制器传递函数在这种情况下为[8]：
however, an asymmetric pulse is generated, but symmetry is restored immediately afterwards, so that its temporary loss is of little consequence.
在这种双重更新模式下，虽然会产生不对称的脉冲，但对称性立即恢复，因此暂时的丢失无关紧要。

Maybe less evident is the drawback of this operating mode: given the number of bits, Ne ,
needed to represent the duty-cycle and the clock frequency fclock, the switching period has to be
doubled to contain both the run up and run down phases. Of course, it is possible to maintain the
same modulation frequency of the single update case, but, in order to do that, either the clock
frequency needs to be doubled or the number of bits needs to be reduced by one.
Following the reasoning reported in the previous section, we can derive an exact, continuous
time equivalent model also of the digital PWM with double duty-cycle update. A representation
of this model is shown in Fig. 2.8. Simple calculations show that the small-signal modulator
transfer function is, in this case, given by [8]:

这种操作模式的缺点可能不太明显：给定需要表示占空比的比特数 Ne 和时钟频率 fclock，切换周期必须加倍以包含运行上升和下降阶段。当然，可以保持单次更新情况下相同的调制频率，但是为了做到这一点，时钟频率需要加倍，或者需要将比特数减少一个。

根据前面的推理，我们也可以得到数字 PWM 的精确连续时间等效模型，它具有双重占空比更新。该模型的表示如图 2.8 所示。简单的计算表明，小信号调制器传递函数在这种情况下为[8]：

It is interesting to compare the modulator phase lag for the single and double update modes
of operation. In (2.7), we find arg.PWM.j!// D !TS =2 while, in (2.8), arg.PWM.j!// D
!TS =4 so that, as it could be expected, the modulator phase lag is reduced by one half in the
double update mode. is property can give significant benefits, in terms of the achievable speed
of response, for any controller built on top of the digital modulator.
比较单次和双重更新模式的调制器相位滞后是有趣的。从（2.7）中，我们可以发现 arg.PWM.j!// D !TS =2，而从（2.8）中得到 arg.PWM.j!// D !TS =4，因此，如预期的那样，双重更新模式下的调制器相位滞后减少了一半。这个属性可以给任何建立在数字调制器之上的控制器带来显著的响应速度的好处。

In the most recent studies concerning digital control of power converters the key role played by
the modulator delay in limiting the achievable control bandwidth has been very well clarified. A
different approach has been suggested, that exploits the possibility of sampling control variables,
and consequently adjusting the duty-cycle, several times (e.g., 4, 8, 16 times) within the modu-
lation period. e purpose of this is to reduce the PWM response delay and increase the system
phase margin, extending the benefits seen for the double update in comparison with the single
update mode.
In order to evaluate the modulator phase lag, let us consider the system shown in Fig. 2.9:
the modulating signal is sampled N times during the switching period, so that the sampling time
interval is now Tsampling D TS =N ; moreover, in order to fully exploit the advantages of the multiple
sampling technique, the control algorithm updates the control signal m.t / at each sampling event.
In the multi-sampled case, the PWM is modeled with an equivalent system similar to that shown
in Fig. 2.6, with the only difference that the input signal ms .t/ is now a sequence of variable
amplitude pulses, updated with frequency fsampling D N · fS . Accordingly, the hold time of the
ZOH is now Thold D Tsampling D TS =N . It can be shown that the low-frequency, small-signal
behavior of the multi-sampled digital PWM is again that of a pure delay, 翻译

在最近关于功率变换器数字控制方面的研究中，已经非常清楚地阐明了调制器延迟在限制可实现的控制带宽方面所起的关键作用。提出了一种不同的方法，利用了在调制周期内多次（例如 4、8、16 次）采样控制变量，并因此多次调整占空比的可能性。这样做的目的是减少 PWM 响应延迟并增加系统相位裕度，扩展与单次更新模式相比双重更新模式所看到的好处。

为了评估调制器相位滞后，让我们考虑图 2.9 所示的系统：调制信号在开关周期内被采样 N 次，因此采样时间间隔现在是 Tsampling D TS =N；此外，为了充分利用多重采样技术的优点，控制算法在每个采样事件中更新控制信号 m.t/。对于多重采样情况，PWM 采用与图 2.6 类似的等效系统进行建模，唯一的区别是输入信号 ms .t/ 现在是一个变幅脉冲序列，更新频率为 fsampling D N · fS。相应地，ZOH 的保持时间现在为 Thold D Tsampling D TS =N。可以证明，多重采样数字 PWM 的低频小信号行为仍然是一个纯延迟。

e main drawback of such an approach is represented by the need for proper filtering of
the switching noise from the control signals, that is, instead, straightforward with the single or
double update mode. Filtering the control signals may impair the system phase margin, reducing
the advantage of the multi-sampled strategy. We will come back to this issue in Chapters 3 and 4,
where we will open the discussion of digital controllers and treat the multi-sampled implementa-
tions in more detail. For now, it will be enough to say that some research is in progress around the
world to find means to get the needed filtering without worsening the system stability margin,
for example using sophisticated estimation techniques or particular controller organizations. e
last remark about multi-sampling refers to the hardware required for the implementation. is
is significantly different from what can be considered the standard PWM organization, available
with off the shelf microcontrollers and DSPs, and calls for other solutions, e.g., the use of hard-
ware programmable digital control circuits, like those based on Field Programmable Gate Arrays
(FPGAs). 翻译
这种方法的主要缺点是需要适当过滤控制信号中的开关噪声，在单次或双重更新模式下可以直接实现。对控制信号进行滤波可能会降低系统相位裕度，从而减少多重采样策略的优势。我们将在第 3 和第 4 章回到这个问题，讨论数字控制器并更详细地讨论多重采样实现。现在，足以说一下，全球正在进行一些研究，探索不损害系统稳定裕度的情况下获得
